description: A logistics analysis task requiring the transformation of high-frequency GPS status logs into consolidated journey segments. Using the Oracle Database (HR schema, localhost:1521/XEPDB1, User: hr, Password: hr123), create a database view named JOURNEY_SEGMENTS from the CONTAINER_LOGS table. This view must consolidate consecutive logs with the same status into single rows, ensuring 'A-B-A' transitions (e.g., Transit -> Customs -> Transit) result in distinct segments. The view must include CONTAINER_ID, SEGMENT_ID (sequential per container), STATUS, START_TIME, END_TIME, and DURATION_MINS. Export the view contents to /home/ga/Desktop/journey_report.csv ordered by Container ID and Start Time.
